news.title: Weekly Market Pulse: It's Always Something
news.summary: The boom may or may not be over, but the AI stocks started topping a couple of months ago, and the correction has only gained steam since Nvidia peaked in mid-May (yes, really).

news.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
news.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

news.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
news.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

news.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
news.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

news.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk

news.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
news.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

news.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
news.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

news.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
news.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

news.title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
news.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

news.summary: Maverick Natural Resources has operations in Texas and Oklahoma.

news.title: What's New This Tax Season That Can Save You Money
news.summary: There are some new wrinkles, especially for those who sell things online or bought an EV.

news.title: Chinese Investors With Few Options Turn to Dividends
news.summary: Companies with good payouts are now the hottest bet in China markets.

news.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Fall But Direction for Long-End Yields Still Seen Upward
news.summary: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield fell and ING said the the long end of the Treasury curve will continue trading at higher yields even as Trump hasn’t delivered anything to shock markets so far.

news.title: Russia's Crude Exports Fairly Stable Despite U.S. Sanctions, Goldman Says
news.summary: Oil edged lower in early trade as Goldman Sachs said the latest round of U.S. sanctions against Russia haven’t had a significant impact on the country’s oil exports.
